import sys

# Check differences
print(f"\nDifferences:")
print(f"  Risk diff: {abs(risk_py - risk_c):.2e}")

if abs(risk_py - risk_c) < tolerance and abs(return_py - return_c) < tolerance:
    print("\n✓ Correctness test PASSED!")
else:
    print("\n✗ Correctness test FAILED!")
